vocab.meaning: có khuynh hướng tự nhiên đối với
vocab.example: I always had a natural inclination towards solitary reading, as it allowed me to delve deep into fictional worlds.

vocab.meaning: áp lực từ phía bạn bè (để hòa nhập hoặc tham gia)
vocab.example: In a group setting, I often felt a bit of peer-induced pressure to participate in sports that I didn't particularly enjoy.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng xã hội linh hoạt/dễ uốn nắn
vocab.example: Engaging in group projects as a child helped me develop malleable social skills, allowing me to adapt to different personalities.

vocab.meaning: không bị gò bó/ảnh hưởng bởi sự xao nhãng
vocab.example: I preferred painting alone because it kept my creative process unfettered by distraction or external judgment.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng cảm giác thuộc về (một nhóm/tập thể)
vocab.example: Playing in the neighborhood band was essential to help me cultivate a sense of belonging during my early years.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích trí tuệ khi làm việc một mình
vocab.example: Solving complex jigsaw puzzles provided the kind of solitary intellectual stimulation that I found immensely gratifying.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi không đồng bộ (chơi cùng không gian nhưng không tương tác trực tiếp)
vocab.example: Sometimes I enjoyed asynchronous play, where my friends and I would draw separately while sitting in the same room.
Spending time alone fostered a rich internal dialogue, which eventually led to my interest in creative writing.

vocab.meaning: cấu trúc nhóm có thứ bậc
vocab.example: I occasionally found hierarchical group structures in games like 'cops and robbers' to be quite stifling.

vocab.meaning: thời gian rảnh rỗi tự thực hiện/tự định hướng
vocab.example: I leaned towards self-actualized leisure, choosing activities that reflected my personal growth rather than group trends.
